title: The War at Marineford Begins: Rising Conflict
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #5, Spandam, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: In all, over 100,000 elites are there

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: around the crescent- shaped bay and island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Portgas D. Ace, awaits his fate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before his eyes, protecting the platform,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are the marines' greatest military force,

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: All of the forces of justice imaginable

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: have gathered to prevent Ace's rescue

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: and wait for the Whitebeard Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Now, how do we pass the gates?
